concepts.title: Randomization and control groups
concepts.hook: Enables causal inference by balancing confounders.

concepts.title: Treatment and control selection
concepts.hook: Control arm must be representative; placebo vs business-as-usual varies by context.

concepts.title: Randomization units (user, session, account)
concepts.hook: Affects power and statistical properties; interference may occur at wrong level.

concepts.title: Pre-registration and REDD (Registered Experiment Design Document)
concepts.hook: Reduces p-hacking and HARKing; best practice in rigorous organizations.

concepts.title: Velocity (sample size per day)
concepts.hook: How quickly you accumulate samples determines time-to-decision.

concepts.title: Duration and seasonal bias
concepts.hook: Running experiments over full weeks avoids day-of-week effects; seasons matter for retention.

concepts.title: Holdout and holdback rates
concepts.hook: Controlling what fraction of traffic enters treatment; necessary for ramp-ups.

concepts.title: Instrumentation and logging
concepts.hook: Garbage in, garbage out; log quality determines metric reliability.

concepts.title: Primary vs secondary metrics
concepts.hook: Primary metric drives decision; secondaries catch side effects.

concepts.title: Guardrail metrics
concepts.hook: Flag if experiment harms critical business outcomes (e.g., latency, revenue).

concepts.title: Metric construction (ratios, counts, timing)
concepts.hook: Ratio metrics (CTR, conversion rate) have different variance properties than counts.

concepts.title: Variance reduction techniques (CUPED, stratification)
concepts.hook: Reduces variance of metric estimate; accelerates power without more users.

concepts.title: Sequential testing and peek penalties
concepts.hook: Stopping early inflates Type I error; corrections needed or use truly sequential methods.

concepts.title: Confidence intervals vs Bayesian posterior
concepts.hook: CI: binary decision at boundary; Bayesian: posterior distribution of effect.

concepts.title: Effect size estimation and practical significance
concepts.hook: Statistical significance != business impact; estimate effect size separately.

concepts.title: Multiple arms and multi-armed bandit (MAB)
concepts.hook: Testing many variants; MAB trades exploration-exploitation for faster learning.

concepts.title: Novelty effects and long-term impact
concepts.hook: Short experiment may not capture habituation or withdrawal effects.

concepts.title: Interference and network effects
concepts.hook: When treatment affects untreated users (e.g., recommendation network); violates independence.

concepts.title: Survivorship bias
concepts.hook: If treatment causes users to churn, survivor cohorts differ; use ITT (intention-to-treat).

concepts.title: Simpson's paradox
concepts.hook: Aggregated effect reverses when stratified; understand confounders.
